relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The Lamb stands on Zion with the sealed name-people.
Heaven sounds like waters, thunder, and harps.
A new song belongs to the purchased ones.
They follow the Lamb wherever he goes.
No lie is found in their mouth.
Age-long good news flies to every people.
Worship the Creator of heaven, earth, sea, and springs.
Babylon is announced fallen.
Beast-allegiance is warned against.
False worship meets Divine reckoning.
Beast-worship gives no true rest.
Holy endurance keeps Divine commands and Jesus' trust.
Those dying in the Lord rest, and their works follow.
The crowned son-of-human figure sits on cloud with sickle.
The earth-harvest is ready.
The earth is harvested.
Another sickle comes from heaven's temple.
The vine of earth is gathered.
The winepress image exposes judgment on corrupt fruit.
The overflowing image shows the scale of symbolic reckoning.

contemplative_note: Revelation 14 contrasts Lamb-allegiance and Babylon/beast allegiance: truth in the mouth, endurance in the saints, rest in the Lord, and corrupt fruit exposed.
